Phong Trào Thiếu Nhi Thánh Thể Việt Nam · VEYM

Đoàn Emmanuel

Vietnamese Eucharistic Youth Movement in the USA

Liên Đoàn Biển Đức · St. Benedict League of Chapters

Join Our CommunityOur Mission
Scroll

Who We Are

About Our Đoàn

We are a faith community rooted in the Vietnamese Catholic tradition, nurturing young people through faith, service, and fellowship.

★

Our Mission

To form young Vietnamese Catholics in faith, love, and service through the Eucharistic spirituality of VEYM.

Learn More →
★

Our Team

Meet the dedicated Huynh Trưởng leaders who guide and inspire our youth each week with passion and commitment.

Learn More →
★

Our History

Forty years of faith, community, and service — from our founding to today’s thriving Đoàn family.

Learn More →

Our Divisions

Ngành · Youth Divisions

Five age-based divisions, each with its own color, motto, and mission — together forming one community in Christ.

Ấu Nhi

Ngoan · Obedience

Our youngest members growing in faith, innocence, and love for God.

View Details →

Thiếu Nhi

Hy Sinh · Sacrifice

Searching for identity through sacrifice, community, and the Eucharist.

View Details →

Nghĩa Sĩ

Chinh Phục · Conquer

Conquering challenges and growing in strength and purpose.

View Details →

Hiệp Sĩ

Dấn Thân · Serve

Serving with courage, service, and Eucharistic devotion.

View Details →

Huynh Trưởng

Phụng Sự · Service

The leaders who guide the next generation in faith and formation.

View Details →

Calendar

Upcoming Events

Stay connected with all Đoàn activities and celebrations.

August 15–17, 2025

Lavang XXV — "Forty Years of Memories"

Our 25th annual Lavang summer camp and 40th anniversary celebration.

July 17–20, 2025

Đại Hội Nghĩa Hiệp 2025

Liên Đoàn Biển Đức regional gathering for Nghĩa Sĩ and Hiệp Sĩ youth.

June 22, 2025

Bổn Mạng 2025

Our Feast Day celebration honoring Our Lady of La Vang.

April 5–6, 2025

Về Đất Hứa VIII

Leadership desert training camp for team leaders and assistants.

About Us

Our Mission

The heart and purpose of Đoàn Emmanuel.

"To form young Vietnamese Catholics deeply rooted in the Eucharist, guided by Our Lady of La Vang, growing in faith, knowledge, and service."

Mission Statement

40+

Years of Service

5

Youth Divisions

1

Community Family

Community

Join Our Đoàn

Become part of our Vietnamese Catholic youth family.

Đoàn Emmanuel

Vietnamese Eucharistic Youth Movement · Liên Đoàn Biển Đức · St. Benedict League of Chapters. Serving Vietnamese Catholic youth for over 40 years.
